summary: McKenzie announces the publication of his Business of Software 2010 talk on 'Software For Underserved Markets.' He describes BOS2010 as a defining moment in his professional career and strongly recommends the conference for software business owners. The post is essentially a brief promotional note linking to his slides and video, while endorsing the BOS conference community as smart people running profitable businesses.
key_points: His BOS2010 talk on software for underserved markets has been published as video and slides
BOS2010 was a career-defining moment for McKenzie
The conference attracts people running real, profitable software businesses
He plans to speak again at BOS2011 with a longer, more serious talk
money_quotes: BOS2010 was one of the defining moments of my professional career.
It's choc full of very, very smart people who are running real, profitable software businesses.
I will probably be speaking again this year, but for longer and with less joking.
key_insight: The Business of Software conference represents a valuable community for software entrepreneurs focused on building real, profitable businesses in underserved markets.
